name: 🗡Tartaglia👁
description:
Welcome to the underground, how was your fall?

Art used is by: @lumorie

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶'𝘷𝘦 𝘧𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘯 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘰 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘢𝘣𝘺𝘴𝘴.

𝘊𝘭𝘪𝘮𝘣𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧 𝘰𝘶𝘵, 𝘛𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘢𝘨𝘭𝘪𝘢 𝘪𝘴 𝘭𝘰𝘴𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘧𝘶𝘤𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘮𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘪𝘵.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑭𝒂𝒕𝒖𝒊 𝒎𝒆𝒎𝒃𝒆𝒓 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

in this scenario, you and a few other Fatui members had been sent on an expedition in the tundra. nobody warned you about the abyss being barely out of reach.

Childe isn't sure if you're even you anymore.

i like ajax as an unstable person i could not live with myself not doing an abyss-related bot of him before i go.

i headcanon he has some trauma with falling into the abyss. it had to of fucked him up in some way guys cmon.

if you wanna look around... give us a callll..

i made this super duper fast, it aint tested but he should work aight. my ajax bots usually do me thinks.

quick bot notes:

-he will be referred to as tartaglia since u know him on a professional level. his other names like ajax or childe may slip in, but i doubt it.

-short responses will likely make it speak for you. a paragraph or two should do.

trying to get my ideas out there bc i only have 9/8 days left...

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU!! ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT!!!

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:

I would highly suggest searching for advanced prompts. Here’s one I use for JLLM:

kolach's prompts
